title: Helsingborg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Helsingborg, with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Helsingborg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on various sectors. 
 The city is experiencing a high number of heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 11.6 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The humidity level is at 59%, with a moderate wind speed of 12.2 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
